gnomad.note: Ashkenazi Jewish founder mutation (6174delT); global AF small but non-zero

insilico.note: PVS1-class frameshift; missense and splice predictors not applicable; CADD approximate

literature.title: The carrier frequency of the BRCA1 185delAG mutation and the BRCA2 6174delT mutation in Ashkenazi Jews.
literature.abstract: Struewing et al. reported BRCA2 6174delT, now NM_000059.4:c.5946del, as a recurrent Ashkenazi Jewish founder mutation.

literature.title: Breast and ovarian cancer risks due to inherited mutations in BRCA1 and BRCA2.
literature.abstract: Carrier-risk estimates support the high-penetrance pathogenic interpretation of established BRCA2 founder frameshift variants including c.5946del.
